---
title: "Kaplan-Meier curves"
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: source
---

## Worcester Heart Attack Study, 1

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| label: 08-02-setup

library(ggfortify)
library(glue)
library(readr)
library(survival)
library(tidyverse)
library(yaml)

load("../data/module08.RData")
```


## Event count

```{r}
#| label: 08-02-whas-fstat-count-table

whas_fstat_count_table
```

::: notes

:::

## Overall Kaplan-Meier curve

```{r}
#| label: 08-02-whas-null-km-plot

whas_null_km_plot
```

## Kaplan-Meier curve by gender

```{r}
#| label: 08-02-whas-gender-km-plot

whas_gender_km_plot
```

## Log rank test

```{r}
#| label: 08-02-whas-gender-logrank-model

whas_gender_logrank_model
```
